Records.authors: Flieger, Wojciech, Henn, Johannes, Schreiber, Anders, Trnka, Jaroslav
Records.description: One-loop box with 4 internal masses $m_1..m_4$ in 4D embedding-space (dual-conformal) formalism. Coulomb-branch on-shell conditions $p_i^2=m_i^2+m_{i+1}^2$. Variables $u=(1+x^2)^2/(4x^2)$, $v=(1+y^2)^2/(4y^2)$; canonical pure basis of 4 masters.
Records.familyName: 4-mass one-loop 4-point box (Coulomb branch of N=4 sYM)

Records.description: Fully massive one-loop box with 4 distinct propagator masses and 6 external invariants (10 scales), computed to $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^2)$. Decomposed into 24 orthoschemes. Two types of square roots rationalized. First explicit MPL result at higher $\varepsilon$ orders for the generic massive box.
Records.familyName: fully massive 1-loop box (10 scales, higher eps)

Records.description: The general scalar one-loop 4-point (box) integral D0 with four arbitrary complex internal masses and general external momenta in D=4-2*eps dimensions. The paper provides closed-form analytic results in terms of dilogarithms and logarithms for all kinematic configurations, including regular and singular (IR-divergent) cases.

One-loop four-edge cycle (box) graph with all four internal masses m_1,...,m_4 non-vanishing and all four external momenta q_1,...,q_4 generic (non-vanishing). Symanzik polynomials given in Eq. labeled `Symanzik-four-edge`: Psi_G = sum alpha_i, Xi_G as quadratic in alpha with mass and momentum dependence. Theorem 1 of the paper computes the motivic Galois coaction Delta I_G^m on the associated motivic Feynman amplitude in d=4 dimensions, expressing it in terms of motivic periods of bubble subquotients (in d=2) and de Rham logarithms log^dr(f_{j,k}) with arguments built from the matrix C of Xi_G. The Feynman integral evaluates to dilogarithms (weight 2). Section 3 of the paper checks compatibility with the explicit dilogarithmic expression of Olesen-Williams. Reduction lemma (Section 2) shows any one-loop graph with N>=5 edges in d=4 is a k_S-linear combination of motivic periods of 4-edge quotients of G.
Records.location: Section 1 (Theorem 1, Eq. after first-integral); Section 3 (Eq. (Symanzik-four-edge), proof of Theorem 1); box-graph figure

Names: 4-mass one-loop 4-point box (Coulomb branch of N=4 sYM)
fully massive 1-loop box (10 scales, higher eps)
